BLOCKED_BY_DEPENDENCY: design-signature gap surfaced as blocker. The 02-01 named production file crates/overdrive-dataplane/src/mtls/intercept.rs has no home in the FROZEN 4-method MtlsEnforcement contract (probe/enforce/liveness/teardown). Per feature-delta SD-1 + the reviewed-APPROVED 01-01 walking-skeleton docstring, the intercept+leg-acquire surface (cgroup_connect4 attach, MTLS_REDIRECT_DEST program, leg-F/leg-C listeners, accept, getsockname orig-dst) is the WORKER composition-root role (the worker-wiring step the roadmap-review FLAGGED as MISSING, external_validity=FAILED), NOT adapter API. Writing intercept.rs as a dataplane adapter module requires inventing a new public driving-port surface the design forbids. Orchestrator/user must pin: (a) the exact signature/home of the intercept surface, or (b) confirm 02-01 ACs are already satisfied by 01-01 and re-scope. Cannot write GREEN without inventing surface.

non_blocking_findings.description: Module doc still names 'the forward sockmap EGRESS-redirect', retired by D-MTLS-13. A false forward-pointer in production code (no-aspirational-docs rule). NOTE (orchestrator verification): this is NOT an isolated site — see D3; the b6459ba3 'reconcile forward-path docs' pass was incomplete.
non_blocking_findings.fix: Reword lib.rs:39-44 to the asymmetric model per the SSOT (mtls_enforcement.rs:1-44 + splice.rs:1-34): forward/response = read->write_all COPY into kTLS-TX; return/deliver = zero-copy splice out of kTLS-RX. Do NOT copy mtls/mod.rs:1-14 — it is itself stale (D3).

non_blocking_findings.description: #[allow(...)] reason says 'Allowed for the RED scaffold' but the test is fully GREEN. The needless_pass_by_ref_mut allow itself is still justified; only the wording is stale.
non_blocking_findings.fix: Trim the RED-scaffold wording from the allow reason.

non_blocking_findings.dimension: documentation (incomplete D-MTLS-13 reconciliation) — surfaced by orchestrator verification, NOT in the subagent review
non_blocking_findings.location: crates/overdrive-dataplane/src/mtls/mod.rs:{9,11-12,18,75,142}; outbound.rs:{5,253-259,260,261,324} (fn probe_ktls_arm_and_forward_splice_round_trip + call site :232 + sentinel const + error string); ktls.rs:32; crates/overdrive-bpf/src/programs/mod.rs:17
non_blocking_findings.description: The b6459ba3 'reconcile forward-path docs to the proven copy pump' pass fixed the contract (mtls_enforcement.rs) and splice.rs but left ~8 production-doc sites + a private probe fn still describing the OUTBOUND forward (and INBOUND response) path as a 'splice' / 'splice pump symmetric to the others' / 'splice(2) pump in EVERY direction' / 'splice into kTLS-TX (forward + response)'. This contradicts the actual mechanism (read->write_all COPY into kTLS-TX) AND the contract, which states verbatim that 'a splice INTO a kTLS-TX socket is NOT used ... loses records'. mtls/mod.rs:18 is the sharpest: it asserts the exact forbidden thing. The probe BODY is correct (uses PumpHandle::spawn_encrypt = write_all copy, outbound.rs:299) — this is naming/doc drift, NOT a logic bug; behavior is correct. Non-blocking but compounds across readers (the project's 'false reference' hazard). The subagent's original D1 'match mtls/mod.rs:1-14' fix would have propagated this drift.
non_blocking_findings.fix: Sweep all listed sites to the asymmetric write_all-COPY-into-TX / splice-out-of-RX model per the SSOT. Rename the private probe fn + sole call site + sentinel const + error string from 'forward_splice'/'forward-splice' to 'forward_encrypt'/'forward-encrypt' to match the already-renamed public ProbeSentinel label (b6459ba3) and the real primitive. Compile-check (Lima) + clippy after the rename. Then grep to confirm no remaining forward-as-splice descriptions.

dimensions_verified.design_fidelity: PASS — trait surface is exactly probe/enforce/liveness/teardown; no invented public method/type/variant. enforce dispatches on Direction (enforce_outbound/inbound are private impl decomposition). Contract was landed by this step (c316660e, per roadmap implementation_scope) and reconciled to the ratified D-MTLS-13 decision (bb6489ef REMOVED 4 retired sockmap ProbeSentinel variants; b6459ba3 changed one label) — surface only REMOVED per a ratified decision, never invented to pass tests. NOTE: corrects the subagent's literal 'contract not modified' claim, which is imprecise; the substance (no invented surface) holds.
dimensions_verified.sockmap_to_write_all_pivot_d_mtls_13: PASS — mtls_forward map file deleted; only MTLS_REDIRECT_DEST (live HASH for connect-rewrite) remains. No orphaned sk_skb/MTLS_FPORT/MTLS_ARMED/drain_leg_to_empty apparatus; all grep hits are retirement comments. splice.rs run_encrypt_pump is the proven read->write_all COPY into kTLS-TX.
dimensions_verified.evidence_honesty: PASS — live #[tokio::test], real netns/veth + cgroup-isolated netns subprocesses, real cgroup_connect4 BPF attach + real nft-TPROXY, real AF_PACKET wire oracle deriving 0x17/cleartext from captured bytes (not handshake bookkeeping), byte-exact plaintext assertions, NO-RST under BOTH normal and 400ms-delayed timing. Not #[ignore]/#[should_panic]/no-op. Fails LOUD on unsupported topology (defeats the --no-run hole). GREEN+COMMIT EXECUTED PASS supersede the earlier checkpoint skips.
dimensions_verified.identity_reader_discipline_d_mtls_9: PASS — SVID+bundle read only via IdentityRead::svid_for/current_bundle; probe sentinel is an ephemeral rcgen cert signed by neither CA, never in the bundle, loopback-only; workloads hold nothing.
dimensions_verified.ktls_splice_unsafe_correctness: PASS — no double-close (forget-to-borrow discipline), single-writer prelude ordering (the ~10-15% kTLS-TX desync fix), EAGAIN on both splice directions, POLLHUP-after-drain, stop-flag join on spawn_blocking, accurate SAFETY comments. tls_config: WebPkiClientVerifier REQUIRE+VERIFY, NewSessionTicket suppressed, peer_certificates read before dangerous_extract_secrets.
dimensions_verified.fail_closed_confidentiality: PASS (scope-correct) — error paths close owned legs with no cleartext egress; F4/F7 limits wired; no half-implemented limit. Fail-closed negatives + pump supervision correctly deferred to slice 05.
dimensions_verified.f5_intercept_exemption: PASS — outbound leg-B exempt via cgroup-subtree scoping; inbound leg-S exempt via MTLS_LEG_S_DIAL_MARK SO_MARK accepted first in nft prerouting; bypass is agent-private.

reviews.summary: BLOCKING composed walking-skeleton gate (F2) is sound and APPROVED to unblock subsequent slices. Design implemented verbatim against the 4 pinned MtlsEnforcement methods with zero invented surface; the D-MTLS-13 sockmap->write_all pivot is fully and cleanly executed with no orphaned apparatus; the Tier-3 test genuinely executes the composed bidirectional flow over real netns/veth/cgroup with a captured-bytes confidentiality oracle under normal and delayed timing. Only two stale comments (D1 production module doc still naming the retired sockmap mechanism; D2 test allow-reason wording) — both non-blocking; fold into the next touch of those files.
